suspects.name: Thomas Carson
suspects.deception_policy: Thomas lies about his whereabouts to cover up his involvement.
suspects.voice: Thomas speaks in long, complicated sentences with a slight stutter. He avoids talking about the estate's financial difficulties.

suspects.name: Ella Brown
suspects.deception_policy: Ella tells the truth to protect her reputation.
suspects.voice: Ella talks in a cheerful tone with frequent laughter. She avoids discussing Margaret's personal life.

suspects.name: Robert Dunn
suspects.deception_policy: Robert is honest but tends to embellish details.
suspects.voice: Robert speaks in a formal manner with perfect grammar. He avoids mentioning his own private matters.

suspects.name: Samantha Green
suspects.voice: Samantha speaks in short, cryptic sentences. She avoids discussing her past.

suspects.name: Charles Hill
suspects.deception_policy: Charles sticks to the facts but is very reticent.
suspects.voice: Charles speaks in a monotone with long pauses. He avoids mentioning his inheritance.

locations.name: Library
locations.description: A vast room filled with shelves of ancient books and cozy reading nooks.

locations.name: Billiards Room
locations.description: An elegant room with a green felt table and polished cues, often used for social gatherings.

locations.name: Study
locations.description: A dark study filled with leather-bound books and personal artifacts of the estate owner.

locations.name: Kitchen
locations.description: The heart of the house, where meals are prepared and staff gather.

locations.name: Dining Room
locations.description: A grand room with a long table and elegant dining ware.

locations.name: Garden
locations.description: An expansive garden with lush greenery, perfect for quiet contemplation or private conversations.

clues.description: A torn piece of paper with a name and address scrawled on it, incriminating thomas_carson.
A broken cue stick with traces of poison residue.
A letter from an unknown sender threatening Margaret's position at the estate.
A partially consumed pastry with unusual ingredients known to be toxic.

canonical_timeline.description: Thomas starts the evening at the billiards room, plotting his next move.
Margaret is found dead in the library, poisoned by an unknown assailant.
